{-# LANGUAGE TypeOperators #-}
{-# LANGUAGE TypeApplications #-}
{-# LANGUAGE ConstraintKinds #-}
{-# LANGUAGE FlexibleContexts #-}
{-# LANGUAGE LambdaCase #-}
{-# LANGUAGE NamedFieldPuns #-}
{-# LANGUAGE TypeFamilies #-}
{-# LANGUAGE ScopedTypeVariables #-}
{-# LANGUAGE RankNTypes #-}
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedLabels #-}
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}
{-# LANGUAGE DataKinds #-}
{-# LANGUAGE AllowAmbiguousTypes #-}
{-# LANGUAGE MultiWayIf #-}
{-# LANGUAGE NumericUnderscores #-}

{-|
This module implements the main abstract logic of the Internet Computer. It
assumes a pure and abstracted view on Canisters (provided by "IC.Canister"),
and deals with abstract requests ('CallRequest', 'QueryRequest', ...), so HTTP
and CBOR-level processing has already happened.
-}
module IC.Ref
  ( IC(..)
  , CallRequest(..)
  , callerOfCallRequest
  , QueryRequest(..)
  , ReadStateRequest(..)
  , RequestStatus(..)
  , ReqResponse(..)
  , CallResponse(..)
  , initialIC
  , authCallRequest
  , authQueryRequest
  , authReadStateRequest
  , submitRequest
  , handleQuery
  , handleReadState
  , runStep
  , runToCompletion
  , processHeartbeats
  -- $ Exported for use as a library, e.g. in testing
  , setAllTimesTo
  , createEmptyCanister
  -- $ Exported merely for debug introspection
  , CallContext(..)
  , Message(..)
  , CanState(..)
  , CallOrigin(..)
  , EntryPoint(..)
  , RunStatus(..)
  , CanisterContent(..)
  )
where

import qualified Data.Map as M
import qualified Data.Row as R
import qualified Data.Row.Variants as V
import qualified Data.ByteString.Lazy as BS
import qualified Data.Text as T
import qualified Data.Vector as Vec
import qualified Data.Set as S
import Data.List
import Data.Maybe
import Numeric.Natural
import Data.Functor
import Control.Monad.State.Class
import Control.Monad.Except
import Control.Monad.Random.Lazy
import Data.Sequence (Seq(..))
import Data.Foldable (toList)
import Codec.Candid
import Data.Row ((.==), (.+), (.!), type (.!))
import GHC.Stack

import IC.Types
import IC.Constants
import IC.Canister
import IC.CBOR.Utils
import IC.Id.Fresh
import IC.Utils
import IC.Management
import IC.HashTree hiding (Blob)
import IC.Certificate
import IC.Certificate.Value
import IC.Certificate.CBOR
import IC.Crypto
import IC.Crypto.Bitcoin as Bitcoin
import IC.Ref.IO (sendHttpRequest)

-- Abstract HTTP Interface

data CallRequest
    = CallRequest CanisterId UserId MethodName Blob
  deriving (CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
(CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool)
-> (CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool) -> Eq CallRequest
forall a. (a -> a -> Bool) -> (a -> a -> Bool) -> Eq a
/= :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
$c/= :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
== :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
$c== :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
Eq, Eq CallRequest
Eq CallRequest
-> (CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Ordering)
-> (CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool)
-> (CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool)
-> (CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool)
-> (CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool)
-> (CallRequest -> CallRequest -> CallRequest)
-> (CallRequest -> CallRequest -> CallRequest)
-> Ord CallRequest
CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Ordering
CallRequest -> CallRequest -> CallRequest
forall a.
Eq a
-> (a -> a -> Ordering)
-> (a -> a -> Bool)
-> (a -> a -> Bool)
-> (a -> a -> Bool)
-> (a -> a -> Bool)
-> (a -> a -> a)
-> (a -> a -> a)
-> Ord a
min :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> CallRequest
$cmin :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> CallRequest
max :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> CallRequest
$cmax :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> CallRequest
>= :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
$c>= :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
> :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
$c> :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
<= :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
$c<= :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
< :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
$c< :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Bool
compare :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Ordering
$ccompare :: CallRequest -> CallRequest -> Ordering
Ord, CallId -> CallRequest -> ShowS
[CallRequest] -> ShowS
CallRequest -> MethodName
(CallId -> CallRequest -> ShowS)
-> (CallRequest -> MethodName)
-> ([CallRequest] -> ShowS)
-> Show CallRequest
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [CallRequest] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [CallRequest] -> ShowS
show :: CallRequest -> MethodName
$cshow :: CallRequest -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> CallRequest -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> CallRequest -> ShowS
Show)

data QueryRequest = QueryRequest CanisterId UserId MethodName Blob
data ReadStateRequest = ReadStateRequest UserId [Path]

data RequestStatus
  = Received
  | Processing
  | CallResponse CallResponse
  deriving (CallId -> RequestStatus -> ShowS
[RequestStatus] -> ShowS
RequestStatus -> MethodName
(CallId -> RequestStatus -> ShowS)
-> (RequestStatus -> MethodName)
-> ([RequestStatus] -> ShowS)
-> Show RequestStatus
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [RequestStatus] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [RequestStatus] -> ShowS
show :: RequestStatus -> MethodName
$cshow :: RequestStatus -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> RequestStatus -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> RequestStatus -> ShowS
Show)

data CallResponse
  = Rejected (RejectCode, String, Maybe ErrorCode)
  | Replied Blob
  deriving (CallId -> CallResponse -> ShowS
[CallResponse] -> ShowS
CallResponse -> MethodName
(CallId -> CallResponse -> ShowS)
-> (CallResponse -> MethodName)
-> ([CallResponse] -> ShowS)
-> Show CallResponse
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [CallResponse] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [CallResponse] -> ShowS
show :: CallResponse -> MethodName
$cshow :: CallResponse -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> CallResponse -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> CallResponse -> ShowS
Show)

data ReqResponse
  = QueryResponse CallResponse
  | ReadStateResponse Certificate
  deriving (CallId -> ReqResponse -> ShowS
[ReqResponse] -> ShowS
ReqResponse -> MethodName
(CallId -> ReqResponse -> ShowS)
-> (ReqResponse -> MethodName)
-> ([ReqResponse] -> ShowS)

-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [ReqResponse] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [ReqResponse] -> ShowS
show :: ReqResponse -> MethodName
$cshow :: ReqResponse -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> ReqResponse -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> ReqResponse -> ShowS
Show)

-- IC state

-- The canister state

data RunStatus
  = IsRunning
  | IsStopping [CallId]
  | IsStopped
  | IsDeleted -- not actually a run state, but convenient in this code
  deriving (RunStatus -> RunStatus -> Bool
(RunStatus -> RunStatus -> Bool)
-> (RunStatus -> RunStatus -> Bool) -> Eq RunStatus
forall a. (a -> a -> Bool) -> (a -> a -> Bool) -> Eq a
/= :: RunStatus -> RunStatus -> Bool
$c/= :: RunStatus -> RunStatus -> Bool
== :: RunStatus -> RunStatus -> Bool
$c== :: RunStatus -> RunStatus -> Bool
Eq, CallId -> RunStatus -> ShowS
[RunStatus] -> ShowS
RunStatus -> MethodName
(CallId -> RunStatus -> ShowS)
-> (RunStatus -> MethodName)
-> ([RunStatus] -> ShowS)
-> Show RunStatus
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [RunStatus] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [RunStatus] -> ShowS
show :: RunStatus -> MethodName
$cshow :: RunStatus -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> RunStatus -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> RunStatus -> ShowS
Show)

data CanisterContent = CanisterContent
  { CanisterContent -> CanisterModule
can_mod :: CanisterModule
  , CanisterContent -> WasmState
wasm_state :: WasmState
  }
  deriving (CallId -> CanisterContent -> ShowS
[CanisterContent] -> ShowS
CanisterContent -> MethodName
(CallId -> CanisterContent -> ShowS)
-> (CanisterContent -> MethodName)
-> ([CanisterContent] -> ShowS)
-> Show CanisterContent
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [CanisterContent] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [CanisterContent] -> ShowS
show :: CanisterContent -> MethodName
$cshow :: CanisterContent -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> CanisterContent -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> CanisterContent -> ShowS
Show)

data CanState = CanState
  { CanState -> Maybe CanisterContent
content :: Maybe CanisterContent -- absent when empty
  , CanState -> RunStatus
run_status :: RunStatus
  , CanState -> Set CanisterId
controllers :: S.Set EntityId
  , CanState -> Natural
memory_allocation :: Natural
  , CanState -> Natural
compute_allocation :: Natural
  , CanState -> Natural
freezing_threshold :: Natural
  , CanState -> Timestamp
time :: Timestamp
  , CanState -> Natural
cycle_balance :: Natural
  , CanState -> Blob
certified_data :: Blob
  -- |Not part of the spec, but in this implementation we schedule
  -- heartbeats only for canisters who have not been idle since the
  -- last heartbeat, so we remember the last action.
  , CanState -> Maybe EntryPoint
last_action :: Maybe EntryPoint
  }
  deriving (CallId -> CanState -> ShowS
[CanState] -> ShowS
CanState -> MethodName
(CallId -> CanState -> ShowS)
-> (CanState -> MethodName)
-> ([CanState] -> ShowS)
-> Show CanState
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [CanState] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [CanState] -> ShowS
show :: CanState -> MethodName
$cshow :: CanState -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> CanState -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> CanState -> ShowS
Show)

-- A canister entry point is either a publicly named function, a closure
-- (callback + environment) or a heartbeat.
data EntryPoint
  = Public MethodName Blob
  | Closure Callback Response Cycles
  | Heartbeat
  deriving (CallId -> EntryPoint -> ShowS
[EntryPoint] -> ShowS
EntryPoint -> MethodName
(CallId -> EntryPoint -> ShowS)
-> (EntryPoint -> MethodName)
-> ([EntryPoint] -> ShowS)
-> Show EntryPoint
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [EntryPoint] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [EntryPoint] -> ShowS
show :: EntryPoint -> MethodName
$cshow :: EntryPoint -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> EntryPoint -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> EntryPoint -> ShowS
Show)

type CallId = Int
data CallContext = CallContext
  { CallContext -> CanisterId
canister :: CanisterId
  , CallContext -> CallOrigin
origin :: CallOrigin
  , CallContext -> NeedsToRespond
needs_to_respond :: NeedsToRespond
  , CallContext -> Bool
deleted :: Bool
  , CallContext -> Natural
available_cycles :: Cycles
  , CallContext -> Maybe MethodName
last_trap :: Maybe String
      -- ^ non-normative, but yields better reject messages
  }
  deriving (CallId -> CallContext -> ShowS
[CallContext] -> ShowS
CallContext -> MethodName
(CallId -> CallContext -> ShowS)
-> (CallContext -> MethodName)
-> ([CallContext] -> ShowS)
-> Show CallContext
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [CallContext] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [CallContext] -> ShowS
show :: CallContext -> MethodName
$cshow :: CallContext -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> CallContext -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> CallContext -> ShowS
Show)

data CallOrigin
  = FromUser RequestID
  | FromCanister CallId Callback
  | FromHeartbeat
  deriving (CallOrigin -> CallOrigin -> Bool
(CallOrigin -> CallOrigin -> Bool)
-> (CallOrigin -> CallOrigin -> Bool) -> Eq CallOrigin
forall a. (a -> a -> Bool) -> (a -> a -> Bool) -> Eq a
/= :: CallOrigin -> CallOrigin -> Bool
$c/= :: CallOrigin -> CallOrigin -> Bool
== :: CallOrigin -> CallOrigin -> Bool
$c== :: CallOrigin -> CallOrigin -> Bool
Eq, CallId -> CallOrigin -> ShowS
[CallOrigin] -> ShowS
CallOrigin -> MethodName
(CallId -> CallOrigin -> ShowS)
-> (CallOrigin -> MethodName)
-> ([CallOrigin] -> ShowS)
-> Show CallOrigin
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [CallOrigin] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [CallOrigin] -> ShowS
show :: CallOrigin -> MethodName
$cshow :: CallOrigin -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> CallOrigin -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> CallOrigin -> ShowS
Show)

data Message
  = CallMessage
    { Message -> CallId
call_context :: CallId
    , Message -> EntryPoint
entry :: EntryPoint
    }
  | ResponseMessage
    { call_context :: CallId
    , Message -> Response
response :: Response
    , Message -> Natural
refunded_cycles :: Cycles
    }
  deriving (CallId -> Message -> ShowS
[Message] -> ShowS
Message -> MethodName
(CallId -> Message -> ShowS)
-> (Message -> MethodName) -> ([Message] -> ShowS) -> Show Message
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [Message] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [Message] -> ShowS
show :: Message -> MethodName
$cshow :: Message -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> Message -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> Message -> ShowS
Show)

-- Finally, the full IC state:

data IC = IC
  { IC -> CanisterId ↦ CanState
canisters :: CanisterId ↦ CanState
  , IC -> Blob ↦ (CallRequest, RequestStatus)
requests :: RequestID ↦ (CallRequest, RequestStatus)
  , IC -> Seq Message
messages :: Seq Message
  , IC -> CallId ↦ CallContext
call_contexts :: CallId ↦ CallContext
  , IC -> StdGen
rng :: StdGen
  , IC -> SecretKey
secretRootKey :: SecretKey
  , IC -> SecretKey
secretSubnetKey :: SecretKey
  }
  deriving (CallId -> IC -> ShowS
[IC] -> ShowS
IC -> MethodName
(CallId -> IC -> ShowS)
-> (IC -> MethodName) -> ([IC] -> ShowS) -> Show IC
forall a.
(CallId -> a -> ShowS)
-> (a -> MethodName) -> ([a] -> ShowS) -> Show a
showList :: [IC] -> ShowS
$cshowList :: [IC] -> ShowS
show :: IC -> MethodName
$cshow :: IC -> MethodName
showsPrec :: CallId -> IC -> ShowS
$cshowsPrec :: CallId -> IC -> ShowS
Show)

-- The functions below want stateful access to a value of type 'IC'
type ICM m = (MonadState IC m, HasCallStack, MonadIO m)

initialIC :: IO IC
initialIC :: IO IC
initialIC = do
    let sk1 :: SecretKey
sk1 = Blob -> SecretKey
createSecretKeyBLS Blob
"ic-ref's very secure secret key"
    let sk2 :: SecretKey
sk2 = Blob -> SecretKey
createSecretKeyBLS Blob
"ic-ref's very secure subnet key"

-> (Blob ↦ (CallRequest, RequestStatus))
-> Seq Message
-> (CallId ↦ CallContext)
-> StdGen
-> SecretKey
-> SecretKey
-> IC
IC CanisterId ↦ CanState
forall a. Monoid a => a
mempty Blob ↦ (CallRequest, RequestStatus)
forall a. Monoid a => a
mempty Seq Message
forall a. Monoid a => a
mempty CallId ↦ CallContext
forall a. Monoid a => a
mempty (StdGen -> SecretKey -> SecretKey -> IC)
-> IO StdGen -> IO (SecretKey -> SecretKey -> IC)
forall (f :: * -> *) a b. Functor f => (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
<$> IO StdGen
forall (m :: * -> *). MonadIO m => m StdGen
newStdGen IO (SecretKey -> SecretKey -> IC)
-> IO SecretKey -> IO (SecretKey -> IC)
forall (f :: * -> *) a b. Applicative f => f (a -> b) -> f a -> f b
<*> SecretKey -> IO SecretKey
forall (f :: * -> *) a. Applicative f => a -> f a
pure SecretKey
sk1 IO (SecretKey -> IC) -> IO SecretKey -> IO IC
forall (f :: * -> *) a b. Applicative f => f (a -> b) -> f a -> f b

forall (f :: * -> *) a. Applicative f => a -> f a
pure SecretKey
sk2

-- Authentication and authorization of requests
--
-- The envelope has already been validated. So this includes
--  * Comparing the envelope validity with the contents
--  * Authorization of the sender
--  * ingress message inspection
--  * checking the correct effective id

type RequestValidation m = (MonadError T.Text m, ICM m)

authCallRequest :: RequestValidation m => Timestamp -> CanisterId -> EnvValidity -> CallRequest -> m ()
authCallRequest :: forall (m :: * -> *).

t CanisterId
ecid EnvValidity
ev r :: CallRequest

canister_id CanisterId
user_id MethodName
meth Blob
arg) = do
    CanisterId -> CanisterId -> MethodName -> Blob -> m ()

RequestValidation m =>
CanisterId -> CanisterId -> MethodName -> Blob -> m ()
checkEffectiveCanisterID CanisterId
ecid CanisterId
canister_id MethodName
meth Blob
arg
    EnvValidity -> ValidityPred Timestamp
valid_when EnvValidity
ev Timestamp
t
    EnvValidity -> ValidityPred CanisterId
valid_for EnvValidity
ev CanisterId
user_id
    EnvValidity -> ValidityPred CanisterId
valid_where EnvValidity
ev CanisterId
canister_id
    CallRequest -> m ()
forall (m :: * -> *). RequestValidation m => CallRequest -> m ()
inspectIngress CallRequest
r

-- If `stateTree` ever becomes a bottleneck:
-- Since ic-ref creates a fresh state tree everytime it is used, we _could_
-- construct one with just the required data, e.g. only of the canister in
-- question. That would not be secure, but `ic-ref` doesn’t have to be.
getDataCertificate :: ICM m => Timestamp -> CanisterId -> m Blob
getDataCertificate :: forall (m :: * -> *). ICM m => Timestamp -> CanisterId -> m Blob
